subject: README vs Codebase Gap Report
body:
## README vs Codebase Gap Report

### Overview
The `README.md` was last substantively updated around 2026-04-17 and is significantly out of date. The codebase has grown substantially — multiple major feature subsystems are undocumented, all helper-class line counts are stale, `MainWindow.xaml.cs` has grown by over 5× since the README's figure, and two project folders (`VoiceHeuristics/`, `docs/`) are absent from the project structure table. The AI team roster in the README is also incomplete.

---

###1. MainWindow Line Count — Severely Outdated

The README states:
> `MainWindow.xaml.cs` is **5,605 lines** (down from 8,305 before decomposition)

Actual current count: **30,996 lines**. The decomposition narrative no longer reflects reality — the file has grown nearly 6× past the figure documented as evidence of successful decomposition.

---

### 2. Helper Class Line Counts — All Stale

Every line count in the helper-class table is outdated:

| File | README says | Actual |
|---|---|---|
| `AgentStatusCard.cs` | 322 | 404 |
| `ColorUtilities.cs` | 54 | 71 |
| `SquadCliAdapter.cs` | 124 | 179 |
| `PushToTalkController.cs` | 243 | 289 |
| `MarkdownDocumentRenderer.cs` | 772 | 1,183 |
| `AgentThreadRegistry.cs` | 840 | 1,076 |
| `TranscriptConversationManager.cs` | 481 | 1,780 |
| `BackgroundTaskPresenter.cs` | 813 | 1,291 |
| `PromptExecutionController.cs` | 923 | 2,468 |

The README also states "nine helper classes account for the extracted logic" — the codebase now has far more than nine significant classes.

---

### 3. Missing Project: `VoiceHeuristics/`

The project structure table omits the `VoiceHeuristics/` project entirely. This is a standalone NuGet-published library (`VoiceHeuristics.csproj`) with its own `README.md` documenting the `VoiceInsertionHeuristics.Apply()` API. It is already in the solution (`squad-dash.slnx`) and has tests in `SquadDash.Tests/VoiceInsertionHeuristicsTests.cs`.

---

### 4. Missing Directory: `docs/`

The project structure table does not mention `docs/`. This is a full documentation site (Jekyll/GitHub Pages structure) with sections for `concepts/`, `features/`, `getting-started/`, `panels/`, `reference/`, `customization/`, `options/`, and more. Its own `docs/README.md` notes: *"This documentation is largely AI generated at this point and has not been reviewed."*

---

### 5. Major Undocumented Feature Subsystems

The following subsystems exist in `SquadDash/` with no mention in `README.md`:

| Subsystem | Key Files | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Inbox** | `InboxMessage.cs`, `InboxMessageParser.cs`, `InboxMessageWindow.cs`, `InboxPanelController.cs`, `InboxStore.cs` | Structured inbox for agent-to-user messages with actions|
| **Loop** | `LoopController.cs`, `LoopMdConfig.cs`, `LoopMdParser.cs`, `LoopOutputStore.cs`, `LoopPickerDialog.cs` | Autonomous loop execution from `.squad/loop.md` |
| **Maintenance** | `MaintenanceMdParser.cs`, `MaintenancePanelController.cs`, `MaintenanceRunner.cs`, `MaintenanceReportWriter.cs` (and ~8 more) | Idle-window maintenance task runner with safety levels |
| **Host Commands** | `HostCommandParser.cs`, `HostCommandExecutor.cs`, `HostCommandRegistry.cs`, `HostCommandTranscriptRenderer.cs` | Slash-command extension system for in-transcript commands |
| **Notes Panel** | `NoteItem.cs`, `NotesPanelController.cs`, `NotesStore.cs` | Workspace-scoped notes panel|
| **Doc Revision** | `DocRevisePopup.cs`, `MarkdownRevisionExecutor.cs`, `RevisionHighlightAdorner.cs`, `RevisionHintOverlay.cs` | In-app markdown document editing and revision workflow |
| **Screenshot & Annotation** | `ScreenshotOverlayWindow.cs`, `AnnotationArrow.cs`, `AnnotationRect.cs`, `AnnotationText.cs`, `AnnotationMeasureLine.cs` | Screenshot capture with overlay annotation tools |
| **Commit Approval** | `CommitApprovalItem.cs`, `CommitApprovalStore.cs`, `CommitApprovalWindow.cs` | Approval gate before agents commit to the repo |
| **Multi-instance** | `InstanceActivationChannel.cs`, `RunningInstanceRegistry.cs` | Single-instance enforcement with activation channel |
| **Whisper / Remote Speech** | `WhisperSpeechRecognitionService.cs`, `RemoteSpeechSession.cs` | Additional speech backends beyond Azure Speech |
| **Agent Hiring** | `HireAgentWindow.cs` | UI for adding a new agent to the team |
| **Idle Detection** | `IdleDetectionService.cs` | Drives maintenance windows and loop idle triggers |
| **Task Decomposition** | `DecomposedTaskGroup.cs`, `DecomposedTasksWriter.cs` | Breaks compound prompts into sub-tasks |

---

### 6. AI Team Roster — Incomplete

The README lists 6 agents. `.squad/team.md` now has 12 active members plus a coordinator:

**Documented in README:** Lyra Morn, Arjun Sen, Talia Rune, Jae Min Kade, Vesper Knox, Mira Quill

**Missing from README:**
- Orion Vale — Lead Architect
- Sorin Pyre — Performance Engineer
- Atlas Wren — Mac & Cross-Platform Specialist
- Scribe — Session Logger (Silent)
- Ralph — Work Monitor
- Argus Weld — Maintenance Coordinator (Background)
- Malik Graves — Markdown Specialist

---

### 7. Tool Call Icon Table — May Have Gaps

The Thinking Block tool icon table documents 12 tools. The codebase has grown to include `read_agent`, `write_agent`, `list_agents`, and other agent-management tools that may be handled by `BackgroundTaskPresenter` but are not listed in the README table.

---

### Summary of Severity

| Gap | Severity |
|---|---|
| MainWindow line count (5,605 vs 30,996) | 🔴 High — actively misleading |
| All helper class line counts stale | 🟡 Medium — context is wrong |
| VoiceHeuristics project missing from table | 🟡 Medium — project is invisible to new contributors |
| Inbox / Loop / Maintenance subsystems undocumented | 🔴 High — major features with no README entry |
| AI team roster 6 of 12 agents missing | 🟡 Medium |
| `docs/` folder missing from project structure | 🟠 Medium|
| Host Commands / Commit Approval / Screenshot undocumented | 🟠 Medium |

actions.label: Update README
actions.prompt:
Mira: an audit of README.md against the codebase found significant gaps that need updating. Please update `README.md` (repo root: `D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\README.md`) to fix the following issues:

1. **MainWindow line count**: README says 5,605 lines (down from 8,305). Actual current count is 30,996 lines. Update or remove this specific figure — if the decomposition narrative is no longer accurate, revise the paragraph accordingly.

2. **Helper class line count table**: All 9 line counts in the helper-class table are outdated. Updated figures: AgentStatusCard.cs=404, ColorUtilities.cs=71, SquadCliAdapter.cs=179, PushToTalkController.cs=289, MarkdownDocumentRenderer.cs=1183, AgentThreadRegistry.cs=1076, TranscriptConversationManager.cs=1780, BackgroundTaskPresenter.cs=1291, PromptExecutionController.cs=2468. Also the statement'nine helper classes account for the extracted logic' is now inaccurate — the codebase has many more significant classes.

3. **Project structure table** (the `| Folder | Description |` table): Add two missing rows:
   - `VoiceHeuristics/` — Standalone NuGet-published library providing `VoiceInsertionHeuristics.Apply()` for context-aware speech-to-text insertion adjustments. Targets .NET 10.
   - `docs/` — Full documentation site (Jekyll/GitHub Pages) with Getting Started, Features, Concepts, Panels, Reference, and Customization sections.

4. **AI Team table**: The README lists 6 agents but `.squad/team.md` now has 12. Add the missing agents: Orion Vale (Lead Architect), Sorin Pyre (Performance Engineer), Atlas Wren (Mac & Cross-Platform Specialist), Scribe (Session Logger — Silent), Ralph (Work Monitor), Argus Weld (Maintenance Coordinator — Background), Malik Graves (Markdown Specialist).

5. **New major features**: Add a section (or extend the existing architecture section) to briefly document the major subsystems that exist in the codebase but have no README mention:
   - Inbox panel: structured agent-to-user messages with action buttons (`InboxPanelController`, `InboxStore`, `InboxMessage`, `InboxMessageParser`)
   - Loop system: autonomous loop execution from `.squad/loop.md` (`LoopController`, `LoopMdParser`, `LoopPickerDialog`)
   - Maintenance system: idle-window maintenance tasks from `.squad/maintenance.md` with safety levels (`MaintenanceRunner`, `MaintenanceMdParser`, `MaintenanceReportWriter`)
   - Host commands: slash-command extension system (`HostCommandRegistry`, `HostCommandParser`, `HostCommandExecutor`)
   - Commit approval gate: approval UI before agent commits land (`CommitApprovalWindow`, `CommitApprovalStore`)
   - Screenshot annotation: overlay capture with arrow/rect/text/measure-line tools (`ScreenshotOverlayWindow`, annotation classes)

Do not change the overall tone or structure of the README — make surgical updates to bring it in sync with the actual codebase. Verify your edits compile (i.e., no broken markdown) and run `dotnet build squad-dash.slnx` to confirm nothing is broken.
actions.hint: Ask Mira Quill to update README.md with all identified gaps

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
